name: Improper Neutralization of Alternate XSS Syntax
description: The product does not properly neutralize alternate syntax variations for script injection (e.g., case variations like 'SCRIPT', 'ScRiPt', or alternate encodings), allowing attackers to bypass incomplete sanitization routines.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides input using alternate case or syntax for script tags that bypasses CONTROL[xss_filter] doing case-sensitive or incomplete pattern matching, while the browser interprets the alternate syntax as executable at EGRESS[html_output]
